Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion (1) To Quash Defendants Designation Of Expert Witnesses Dated June 11, 2015, (2) To Exclude At Trial The Testimony Of Clement Jones, M.D. And Peter Chase, D.D.S., Or (3) For A Protective Order Limiting The Fee Defendants Experts May Charge For Giving Deposition Testimony
Off Calendar Jul-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KAREN M. PLATT, ESQ. of the Law Offices of Boris E. Efron, Tel No. 650-851-8880 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KEN VIERRA, ESQ. of Santana, Tcheng, Vierra & Symonds, Tel No. 415-276-0688 appearing for Defendants Irina Kazimirsky and Felix Gofman.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear. Parties stipulated to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court ruled as follows: As to PLAINTIFF LUBA TROYANOVSKY'S Motion (1) To Quash Defendants Designation Of Expert Witnesses Dated June 11, 2015, (2) To Exclude At Trial The Testimony Of Clement Jones, M.D. And Peter Chase, D.D.S., Or (3) For A Protective Order Limiting The Fee Defendants Experts May Charge For Giving Deposition Testimony, the motion is denied in part and granted in part. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the judge pro tem for signature. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported (302/JPT)
